untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific metrics not available in price/technical indicators: (1) Days-to-expiration (DTE) thresholds cannot be expressed with available indicators; (2) Implied volatility (IV) levels and IV percentiles not in allowed indicator list; (3) Open interest (OI) percentile filters not available; (4) Specific IV-to-HV spread in basis points requires direct IV calculation; (5) Earnings/economic event calendar detection not supported. The signal is fundamentally an options volatility arbitrage strategy requiring derivatives pricing data and calendar/event feeds beyond the scope of price-action and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using hvol_20 (historical volatility) > india_vix (market IV proxy) and vol_ratio_20 for elevated OI signal, but these are insufficient proxies for the precise threshold-based logic required. Original signal cannot be reliably backtested with available indicators.
